forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address. If an account exists, we will send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for this email, you will receive a reset link shortly.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.securityHint: Use at least 12 characters including numbers and symbols.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been successfully changed.
